_comment: Gold for ex5. These tasks call live models, so grade on the expected behavior, not exact strings.

rerank.expect_after: all three (or at least 2/3) gold sections at rank 1 after reranking; after > before

contextual.expect: the generated context sentence names the security/incident topic (TOPIC_WORDS hit)

citations.expect_cache: cache_creation_input_tokens > 0 on first call; cache_read_input_tokens > 0 on a repeated call in the same window
